mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM SAMPLE_ITEM
AND ( LOWER(TITLE) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(DESCRIPTION) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SAMPLE_ITEM_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SAMPLE_ITEM (ID, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE SAMPLE_ITEM SET TITLE = #{title}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
